The Visible Truth

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What does the girl want to do for her Movie Director project?
2QUESTION 2: Why does the girl think the scene where Marcus stays is the most important one?
3QUESTION 3: What does the boy think about the girl’s plan for her rewrite?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
